title: Survival of the most compact: the life and death of satellite halos in self-interacting dark matter
summary: Self-interacting dark matter (SIDM) models feature short-range interactions between dark matter (DM) particles that lead to larger diversity in the inner parts of galactic rotation curves and potentially unique gravitational lensing signatures. Satellite galaxies and dark subhalos provide a valuable testing ground for such models. We develop a simulation framework to explore subhalo evolution and its gravothermal collapse for velocity- and angle-dependent self-interacting cross section in these SIDM models. Our results are essential for testing these models. We perform N-body simulations, treating the host halo analytically and modelling the scattering-induced subhalo-halo interaction process using virtual host particles, a central innovation of our work. We use the Eddington inversion method to accurately model the local velocity distribution in the halo. Our approach is significantly less computationally expensive than simulations with a fully resolved host, while incorporating tidal stripping and tidal heating. We test both isotropic and forward-dominated self-scattering, which represent limiting cases for the angular dependence of the self-interaction cross section. Environmental effects, especially the scattering-induced subhalo-halo interaction, have a strong impact on the subhalo evolution and drive a complex structural evolution. As a result, SIDM subhalos have a larger range of central densities and density profile slopes compared to collisionless DM. Our cost-efficient simulation framework enables modelling of SIDM subhalos in realistic environments. Our results highlight the necessity of accurately modelling the scattering-induced subhalo-halo interaction to predict SIDM subhalo density profiles. For the SIDM models we investigate, the enhanced diversity in the mass profiles of subhalos would leave an observable imprint on strong lensing systems and satellite galaxies.

AI.tldr: 开发了模拟自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）子晕演化的计算框架，重点关注速度/角度依赖的散射截面，通过虚拟宿主粒子模拟子晕-晕相互作用，比全分辨率模拟更高效，揭示了SIDM子晕密度分布的更大多样性。
AI.motivation: 自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）模型通过暗物质粒子间的短程相互作用，可能产生独特的星系旋转曲线内区多样性和引力透镜特征。卫星星系和暗物质子晕为测试这些模型提供了重要场所，但需要开发高效模拟框架来研究子晕演化。
AI.method: 开发了N体模拟框架，将主晕解析处理，使用虚拟宿主粒子模拟散射诱导的子晕-晕相互作用过程。采用Eddington反演方法精确建模晕中的局部速度分布。该方法比全分辨率宿主模拟计算成本显著降低，同时包含潮汐剥离和潮汐加热效应。测试了各向同性和前向主导的自散射两种极限情况。
AI.result: 环境效应（特别是散射诱导的子晕-晕相互作用）对子晕演化有强烈影响，驱动复杂的结构演化。SIDM子晕相比无碰撞暗物质具有更大的中心密度范围和密度剖面斜率多样性。计算高效的模拟框架能够建模真实环境中的SIDM子晕。
AI.conclusion: 准确建模散射诱导的子晕-晕相互作用对于预测SIDM子晕密度剖面至关重要。研究的SIDM模型中，子晕质量剖面增强的多样性将在强透镜系统和卫星星系中留下可观测印记。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）模型具有暗物质（DM）粒子之间的短程相互作用，这导致星系旋转曲线内部部分具有更大的多样性，并可能产生独特的引力透镜信号。卫星星系和暗子晕为检验此类模型提供了宝贵的试验场。我们开发了一个模拟框架，用于探索这些SIDM模型中速度依赖和角度依赖的自相互作用截面下的子晕演化及其引力热坍缩。我们的结果对于检验这些模型至关重要。我们进行了N体模拟，解析地处理主晕，并使用虚拟主晕粒子模拟散射诱导的子晕-晕相互作用过程，这是我们工作的核心创新。我们使用爱丁顿反演方法精确模拟晕中的局部速度分布。我们的方法在计算上比完全解析主晕的模拟要经济得多，同时包含了潮汐剥离和潮汐加热。我们测试了各向同性和前向主导的自散射，它们代表了自相互作用截面角度依赖性的极限情况。环境效应，特别是散射诱导的子晕-晕相互作用，对子晕演化有强烈影响，并驱动了复杂的结构演化。因此，与无碰撞暗物质相比，SIDM子晕具有更大范围的中心密度和密度轮廓斜率。我们经济高效的模拟框架能够在现实环境中对SIDM子晕进行建模。我们的结果强调了精确模拟散射诱导的子晕-晕相互作用以预测SIDM子晕密度轮廓的必要性。对于我们研究的SIDM模型，子晕质量轮廓增强的多样性将在强透镜系统和卫星星系中留下可观测的印记。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，准确建模散射诱导的子晕-晕相互作用对于预测SIDM子晕密度剖面至关重要。研究的SIDM模型中，子晕质量剖面增强的多样性将在强透镜系统和卫星星系中留下可观测印记。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left panel: Illustration of the evolution and the mechanisms acting on an isolated SIDM halo, which becomes bound to a host system over time. Right panel: Density map in the orbital plane of a subhalo on an elliptical orbit between \(r_{{apocenter}}=2\,r_{{s,\,host}}\) and \(r_{{pericenter}}=r_{{s,\,host}}\) . The radii \(r_{{s,\,host}}\) and \(r_{{s,\ sub}}\) are the scale radius of the initial NFW host halo and subhalo. The top row shows the evolution of a CDM subhalo, the middle row shows an SIDM subhalo without the SSHI process, and the bottom row shows the evolution with the SSHI process. Our simulations of both SIDM subhalos use an isotropic velocity-dependent cross section.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左图：孤立SIDM晕的演化及作用机制示意图，该晕随时间被束缚到主系统中。右图：在椭圆轨道上运行的子晕轨道平面内的密度图，轨道介于\(r_{{apocenter}}=2\,r_{{s,\,host}}\)和\(r_{{pericenter}}=r_{{s,\,host}}\)之间。半径\(r_{{s,\,host}}\)和\(r_{{s,\ sub}}\)分别是初始NFW主晕和子晕的标度半径。顶行显示CDM子晕的演化，中间行显示没有SSHI过程的SIDM子晕，底行显示有SSHI过程的演化。我们对两个SIDM子晕的模拟均使用各向同性速度依赖截面。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Left panel: The adopted velocity-dependent cross sections are shown together with the typical relative velocities \(\langle v_{{rel}}\rangle\) within the host (black) and subhalo (grey). Right panel: Evolution of the core size \(r_{{core}}\) of an isolated halo with three different effective cross sections. The radius \(r_{{core}}\) is given in units of the scale radius of the initial NFW profile. For each effective cross section, we simulate a constant isotropic cross section (solid), a velocity-dependent isotropic cross section (dotted), and a velocity-dependent forward-dominated cross section (dashed).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图：所采用的速度依赖截面与主晕（黑色）和子晕（灰色）内的典型相对速度\(\langle v_{{rel}}\rangle\)一起显示。右图：具有三种不同有效截面的孤立晕的核心大小\(r_{{core}}\)的演化。半径\(r_{{core}}\)以初始NFW轮廓的标度半径为单位给出。对于每个有效截面，我们模拟了恒定各向同性截面（实线）、速度依赖各向同性截面（点线）和速度依赖前向主导截面（虚线）。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Orbital and cross section parameters. 2 2 2 Simulations for CDM and four SIDM scenarios are performed for three different elliptical orbits (eo). For SIDM, the two velocity-dependent cross sections from Sect. 4.1 are considered; each is implemented with both isotropic (rSIDM) and forward-dominated scattering (fSIDM). The notation \({eo}={A}\) – \({B}\) denotes the apocentre (A) and pericentre (B) distances, given in units of the host’s scale radius, \(r_{{s,\,host}}\) . All cross sections are given in terms of the effective cross section as defined in Eq. ( 9 ), following Yang and Yu ( 2022 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：轨道和截面参数。对CDM和四种SIDM情景进行了三种不同椭圆轨道（eo）的模拟。对于SIDM，考虑了第4.1节中的两种速度依赖截面；每种截面均以各向同性（rSIDM）和前向主导散射（fSIDM）实现。符号\({eo}={A}\) – \({B}\)表示远心点（A）和近心点（B）距离，以主晕的标度半径\(r_{{s,\,host}}\)为单位给出。所有截面均以有效截面表示，如方程（9）所定义，遵循Yang and Yu (2022)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Evolution of the maximum circular velocity \(v_{{max}}\) and its corresponding radius \(r_{{max}}\) . The results for various orbits and cross sections are displayed using the symbols as given in Table 2 . The colour indicates the DM core size, \(r_{{core}}\) . The radii \(r_{{max}}\) and \(r_{{core}}\) are given in units of the scale radius of the initial NFW subhalo.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：最大圆周速度\(v_{{max}}\)及其对应半径\(r_{{max}}\)的演化。不同轨道和截面的结果使用表2中给出的符号显示。颜色表示DM核心大小\(r_{{core}}\)。半径\(r_{{max}}\)和\(r_{{core}}\)以初始NFW子晕的标度半径为单位给出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Bound mass \(M_{{bound}}\) (top panel) and core size \(r_{{core}}\) (bottom panel) as a function of time. The radius \(r_{{core}}\) is given in units of the scale radius of the initial NFW subhalo. The three different orbits are distinguished by colour, and the corresponding pericentres are indicated by the dashed vertical lines. Each orbit is shown for CDM (solid) and for SIDM with isotropic scattering for two different cross sections (dotted and dashed).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：束缚质量\(M_{{bound}}\)（上图）和核心大小\(r_{{core}}\)（下图）随时间的变化。半径\(r_{{core}}\)以初始NFW子晕的标度半径为单位给出。三种不同轨道通过颜色区分，相应的近心点由虚线垂直线指示。每个轨道均显示CDM（实线）和具有各向同性散射的SIDM（点线和虚线）的两种不同截面。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The left panel shows the distance to the centre of the host halo. The radius \(r\) is given in units of the scale radius of the initial NFW host halo. The right panel shows the gradient of the velocity dispersion \({d}v_{{dispr}}/{d}r\) within the initial \(r_{{s}}\) of the subhalos for the higher cross section \(\sigma_{{eff}}/m_{\chi}=50\ {cm}^{2}\ {g}^{-1}\) . The dashed vertical lines indicate the corresponding pericentres.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：左图显示到主晕中心的距离。半径\(r\)以初始NFW主晕的标度半径为单位给出。右图显示子晕初始\(r_{{s}}\)内速度色散的梯度\({d}v_{{dispr}}/{d}r\)，对应较高截面\(\sigma_{{eff}}/m_{\chi}=50\ {cm}^{2}\ {g}^{-1}\)。虚线垂直线表示相应的近心点。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: This figure highlights the effect of tidal heating on the SIDM subhalo with \(\sigma_{{eff}}/m_{\chi}=50\ {cm}^{2}\ {g}^{-1}\) and eo=5–1. The top panel illustrates the evolution of the central density as a blue line. The middle panel shows the central velocity dispersion profile. The bottom panel shows the full radial velocity dispersion profile. \(v_{{max}}\) is here the initial value of the NFW profile. The radius \(r\) is given in units of the scale radius of the initial NFW subhalo.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：此图突出显示了潮汐加热对具有\(\sigma_{{eff}}/m_{\chi}=50\ {cm}^{2}\ {g}^{-1}\)和eo=5–1的SIDM子晕的影响。上图以蓝线说明中心密度的演化。中图显示中心速度色散轮廓。下图显示完整的径向速度色散轮廓。\(v_{{max}}\)是NFW轮廓的初始值。半径\(r\)以初始NFW子晕的标度半径为单位给出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Left panel shows the logarithmic projected density slope \(\gamma_{{2D}}\) between 0.75 kpc and 1.25 kpc versus the projected mass \(M_{{2D}}\) at 1 kpc, and the right panel shows the evolution of the logarithmic projected density slope between 0.25 kpc and 0.75 kpc versus the projected mass at 0.5 kpc. The simulation results for various orbits and cross sections are displayed using the symbols as given in the Table 2 . The colour indicates the DM core size, \(r_{{core}}\) , in units of the scale radius of the initial NFW subhalo. In both panels, the SIDM subhalo evolution tracks the decreasing core size (from purple to green); the CDM halos evolve nearly linearly toward smaller values of \(\gamma_{{2D}}\) and \(M_{{2D}}\) (remaining green, which reflects their persistently small “core” size).
figures.caption_zh: 图7：左图显示0.75 kpc和1.25 kpc之间的对数投影密度斜率\(\gamma_{{2D}}\)与1 kpc处的投影质量\(M_{{2D}}\)的关系，右图显示0.25 kpc和0.75 kpc之间的对数投影密度斜率与0.5 kpc处的投影质量的关系。不同轨道和截面的模拟结果使用表2中给出的符号显示。颜色表示DM核心大小\(r_{{core}}\)，以初始NFW子晕的标度半径为单位。在两个图中，SIDM子晕演化跟踪核心大小的减小（从紫色到绿色）；CDM晕几乎线性地向\(\gamma_{{2D}}\)和\(M_{{2D}}\)的较小值演化（保持绿色，这反映了它们持续较小的“核心”大小）。

title: SPT-3G D1: Maps of the millimeter-wave sky from 2019 and 2020 observations of the SPT-3G Main field
summary: Maps of the sky in millimeter wavelengths contain rich information on cosmology through anisotropies of the cosmic microwave background (CMB). Creating multifrequency sky maps of anisotropies in the $I$, $Q$, and $U$ Stokes parameters is one of the first steps of CMB cosmology analyses. In this work, we describe the production and validation of a set of sky maps from the South Pole Telescope's third-generation camera, SPT-3G. The maps are from data taken in frequency bands centered at 95, 150, and 220 GHz and taken during the first two years, 2019 and 2020, of the SPT-3G Main survey, which covers $4\%$ of the sky. We applied high-pass filters to time series of individual detectors and binned the filtered time series samples into map pixels. After that, we calibrated and cleaned the maps to reduce known systematic errors. In addition, we searched for other systematic errors through null tests and mitigated a significant systematic error detected therein. The white noise levels of the full-depth maps of the $I$ Stokes parameter are $5.4$, $4.4$, and $16.2$ $\mathrm{μK}$-$\mathrm{arcmin}$ in the 95, 150, and 220 GHz bands, respectively, and $8.4$, $6.6$, and $25.8$ $\mathrm{μK}$-$\mathrm{arcmin}$ for $Q/U$. These maps are the deepest to date used for measurements of mid-to-high-$\ell$ primary temperature and $E$-mode polarization CMB anisotropies, and reconstructions of the CMB gravitational lensing potential. We make these maps and supporting data products publicly accessible.

AI.tldr: 南极点望远镜SPT-3G相机前两年观测数据的毫米波天空图制作与验证，包含95、150、220 GHz三个频段的I、Q、U斯托克斯参数图，覆盖4%天空，是目前用于CMB温度、E模偏振各向异性及引力透镜势重建的最深地图。
AI.motivation: 毫米波天空图包含丰富的宇宙学信息，特别是宇宙微波背景辐射的各向异性。制作多频段的I、Q、U斯托克斯参数天空图是CMB宇宙学分析的第一步，需要高质量的数据产品来支持后续的宇宙学研究。
AI.method: 对单个探测器的时间序列应用高通滤波器，将滤波后的时间序列样本分箱到地图像素中。然后对地图进行校准和清理以减少已知的系统误差。通过零检验搜索其他系统误差，并减轻检测到的重要系统误差。
AI.result: I斯托克斯参数全深度地图的白噪声水平在95、150、220 GHz频段分别为5.4、4.4、16.2 μK-arcmin；Q/U参数分别为8.4、6.6、25.8 μK-arcmin。这些地图是目前用于中高ℓ主温度、E模偏振CMB各向异性测量以及CMB引力透镜势重建的最深地图。
AI.conclusion: 成功制作了SPT-3G相机前两年观测数据的高质量毫米波天空图，这些地图产品已公开可用，将为宇宙微波背景辐射的深入研究提供重要数据支持。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 毫米波波段的天空图包含通过宇宙微波背景（CMB）各向异性获得的丰富宇宙学信息。创建 $I$、$Q$ 和 $U$ 斯托克斯参数的多频天空图是CMB宇宙学分析的首要步骤之一。本文描述了利用南极望远镜第三代相机SPT-3G制作并验证一组天空图的过程。这些图来自2019年和2020年SPT-3G主巡天前两年在95、150和220 GHz频段采集的数据，覆盖了4%的天空。我们对单个探测器的时序数据应用了高通滤波器，并将滤波后的时序样本分箱到地图像素中。之后，我们对地图进行了校准和清理，以减少已知的系统误差。此外，我们通过零检验寻找其他系统误差，并减轻了其中检测到的一个显著系统误差。$I$ 斯托克斯参数全深度图的白噪声水平在95、150和220 GHz频段分别为 $5.4$、$4.4$ 和 $16.2$ $\mathrm{μK}$-$\mathrm{arcmin}$，而 $Q/U$ 的白噪声水平分别为 $8.4$、$6.6$ 和 $25.8$ $\mathrm{μK}$-$\mathrm{arcmin}$。这些图是迄今为止用于测量中高 $\ell$ 原初温度和 $E$ 模极化CMB各向异性以及重建CMB引力透镜势的最深地图。我们公开提供了这些地图及配套数据产品。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，成功制作了SPT-3G相机前两年观测数据的高质量毫米波天空图，这些地图产品已公开可用，将为宇宙微波背景辐射的深入研究提供重要数据支持。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The target uniform coverage region of the SPT-3G Main field (the light blue, approximately trapezoidal region) overlaid on top of the full-sky galactic dust map from Planck Public Data Release 3 (the background image) in the equatorial coordinate system and the Mollweide projection. The dust map is the Stokes \(I\) map in the file COM_CompMap_IQU-thermaldust-gnilc-unires_2048_R3.00. fits downloaded from Planck Legacy Archive ( https://pla.esac.esa.int/pla/ ).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：SPT-3G主场的目标均匀覆盖区域（浅蓝色近似梯形区域）叠加在普朗克公开数据第三版的全天银河尘埃图上（背景图像），采用赤道坐标系和摩尔威德投影。尘埃图是文件 COM_CompMap_IQU-thermaldust-gnilc-unires_2048_R3.00.fits 中的斯托克斯 \(I\) 图，该文件从普朗克遗产档案（https://pla.esac.esa.int/pla/）下载。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The target uniform coverage region of the SPT-3G Main field and the footprint of each of the four subfields in a Lambert azimuthal equal-area projection (ZEA, a flat-sky projection, calabretta02 ). title: Unveiling large-scale rotational motions in the intragroup medium at z~1 through gravitational-arc tomography
comment: 18 pages, 12 figures, Astronomy & Astrophysics main journal, in press
summary: We present the first spatially resolved characterisation of the cool intragroup medium (IGrM) in a spectroscopically confirmed galaxy group at z=1.167. Using 30 independent sightlines towards the gravitationally lensed galaxy SGAS J0033+02, we combine background light from an extended gravitational arc and various sources in the field to map the distribution and kinematics of diffuse, metal-enriched gas pertaining to the group. We detect prominent MgII, FeII, CaII, and MgI absorption extending up to 62 kpc from a massive star-forming spiral galaxy and its interacting companion. Together with four other members, these form a compact group with a virial radius of 313 kpc. Down-the-barrel, blueshifted absorption indicates outflows. The distribution and two-dimensional kinematics of this gas suggest the influence of tidal stripping and star formation-driven winds. Intervening absorption across the field partly traces internal galaxy motions. A simple superposition of individual discs cannot reproduce the velocity field at large impact parameters or in counter-rotating regions, while a global IGrM halo with a rotational velocity of ~130 km/s provides a good match. Beyond individual galaxy envelopes, the data are consistent with a group-scale structure that co-rotates in concert with the galaxies. Assuming dynamical equilibrium, we estimate a total (cool+warm+hot) gas mass of 1.3-2.5x10^11 Msol, with large systematic uncertainties, corresponding to approximately 50% of all baryons, within one-quarter of the group's virial radius. These results point to a multiphase IGrM in which cool (~10^4 K) clouds are embedded within a dynamically coherent, group-wide halo. The gas appears gravitationally bound to the group rather than reaccreting onto individual galaxies.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们首次对红移z=1.167处经光谱证认的星系群中冷星系际介质（IGrM）进行了空间分辨表征。利用朝向引力透镜星系SGAS J0033+02的30条独立视线，我们结合来自延展引力弧的背景光以及场中其他源，绘制了该星系群中弥散、富含金属气体的分布和运动学特征。我们探测到显著的MgII、FeII、CaII和MgI吸收，其延伸至一个正在形成恒星的大质量旋涡星系及其相互作用伴星系外62千秒差距处。连同其他四个成员，这些星系构成一个维里半径为313千秒差距的致密星系群。从星系盘方向观测到的蓝移吸收表明存在外流。该气体的分布和二维运动学特征暗示了潮汐剥离和恒星形成驱动的风的影响。场中的介入吸收部分追踪了星系内部运动。单个盘的简单叠加无法再现大碰撞参数或反向旋转区域的速度场，而一个旋转速度约为130公里/秒的全局IGrM晕则提供了良好的匹配。在单个星系包层之外，数据与一个与星系共转的群尺度结构一致。假设动力学平衡，我们估计总（冷+温+热）气体质量为1.3-2.5×10^11太阳质量，存在较大的系统不确定性，对应于在星系群维里半径的四分之一内，约占所有重子物质的50%。这些结果表明存在一个多相IGrM，其中冷（约10^4 K）云嵌入在一个动力学相干的群尺度晕中。该气体似乎受星系群引力束缚，而非重新吸积到单个星系上。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，星系群中存在多相星系际介质，冷却云嵌入动态相干的群尺度晕中，气体受星系群引力束缚而非重新吸积到单个星系。

title: On the cosmology dependence of the cluster weak-lensing mass bias
summary: Measurements of the shear induced by weak gravitational lensing around galaxy cluster lines of sight are the gold standard for calibrating cluster observable-mass relations, thereby enabling a robust and precise inference of cosmological parameters. The weak-lensing mass bias is the systematic offset between the true halo mass and the mass that is inferred from the lensing data using an imperfect model for the halo mass distribution. We study the impact of cosmology on the lensing mass bias to inform future cosmological analyses of galaxy clusters. We create synthetic lensing shear maps for 115,920 projections of clusters with $M_{200\mathrm c}>1.56\times10^{14}\,h^{-1}M_\odot$ in a suite of Magneticum simulations. The simulation boxes are $896\,h^{-1}$Mpc on a side and are set up with 15 different combinations of the cosmological parameters $Ω_\mathrm{m}$, $Ω_\mathrm{b}$, $σ_8$, and $H_0$. Assuming a Navarro-Frenk-White profile, we extract weak-lensing mass measurements and quantify their bias $b_\mathrm{WL}$ with respect to the true halo mass. To investigate the impact of baryonic effects, we perform the analysis on gravity-only simulations and on their full-physics hydrodynamical counterparts. We confirm that assuming a fixed halo concentration or a fixed concentration-mass relation leads to cosmology-dependent changes of the mass bias. We report changes of up to $Δ\ln b_\mathrm{WL}=0.030$ with respect to the bias obtained at the fiducial WMAP7 cosmology. Adopting a model for the concentration that also depends on cosmology absorbs the changes in halo profiles and we recover essentially constant values for the mass bias. Our analysis of hydrodynamical simulations suggests that future, more accurate models will also need to explicitly account for the strength of baryonic effects.

AI.tldr: 研究宇宙学参数对弱引力透镜质量偏差的影响，通过模拟分析发现质量偏差随宇宙学参数变化可达Δln b_WL=0.030，采用宇宙学依赖的浓度模型可吸收这种变化，未来模型还需考虑重子效应强度。
AI.motivation: 弱引力透镜是校准星系团质量-可观测关系的关键技术，但质量偏差（真实晕质量与透镜数据推断质量之间的系统偏移）会影响宇宙学参数推断的精度。本研究旨在量化宇宙学参数对透镜质量偏差的影响，为未来星系团宇宙学分析提供参考。
AI.method: 使用Magneticum模拟套件，创建115,920个星系团投影的合成透镜剪切图。模拟盒子尺寸为896 h^{-1}Mpc，采用15种不同的宇宙学参数组合（Ω_m, Ω_b, σ_8, H_0）。假设Navarro-Frenk-White剖面，提取弱透镜质量测量值并量化其相对于真实晕质量的偏差b_WL。为研究重子效应影响，在纯引力模拟和全物理流体动力学模拟上进行分析。
AI.result: 研究发现，假设固定晕浓度或固定浓度-质量关系会导致质量偏差的宇宙学依赖性变化。相对于基准WMAP7宇宙学，质量偏差变化可达Δln b_WL=0.030。采用依赖宇宙学的浓度模型可以吸收晕剖面的变化，恢复基本恒定的质量偏差值。流体动力学模拟分析表明，未来更精确的模型还需要明确考虑重子效应的强度。
AI.conclusion: 宇宙学参数对弱透镜质量偏差有显著影响，采用宇宙学依赖的浓度模型可以有效减少这种依赖性。未来在星系团宇宙学分析中，需要开发能够同时考虑宇宙学参数和重子效应影响的更精确质量校准模型，以确保宇宙学参数推断的精度和可靠性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 弱引力透镜引起的剪切测量是校准星系团观测-质量关系的黄金标准，从而能够稳健且精确地推断宇宙学参数。弱透镜质量偏差是真实晕质量与使用不完美的晕质量分布模型从透镜数据推断出的质量之间的系统偏差。我们研究宇宙学对透镜质量偏差的影响，为未来星系团的宇宙学分析提供信息。我们为Magneticum模拟套件中115,920个投影的星系团（$M_{200\mathrm c}>1.56\times10^{14}\,h^{-1}M_\odot$）创建了合成透镜剪切图。模拟盒子边长为$896\,h^{-1}$Mpc，并设置了15种不同的宇宙学参数组合（$Ω_\mathrm{m}$、$Ω_\mathrm{b}$、$σ_8$和$H_0$）。假设Navarro-Frenk-White轮廓，我们提取弱透镜质量测量值，并量化其相对于真实晕质量的偏差$b_\mathrm{WL}$。为了研究重子效应的影响，我们在纯引力模拟及其全物理流体动力学对应模拟上进行了分析。我们确认，假设固定的晕浓度或固定的浓度-质量关系会导致质量偏差随宇宙学变化。我们报告了相对于基准WMAP7宇宙学下偏差的变化，最大可达$Δ\ln b_\mathrm{WL}=0.030$。采用也依赖于宇宙学的浓度模型可以吸收晕轮廓的变化，我们恢复了基本恒定的质量偏差值。我们对流体动力学模拟的分析表明，未来更精确的模型还需要明确考虑重子效应的强度。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，宇宙学参数对弱透镜质量偏差有显著影响，采用宇宙学依赖的浓度模型可以有效减少这种依赖性。未来在星系团宇宙学分析中，需要开发能够同时考虑宇宙学参数和重子效应影响的更精确质量校准模型，以确保宇宙学参数推断的精度和可靠性。

The horizontal line indicates the mass bias in our fiducial WMAP7 cosmology, the vertical dotted lines indicate the WMAP7 cosmological parameters. The bias increases with increasing values of \(\Omega_{{m}}\) and \(\sigma_{8}\) . Across the range of cosmologies we probe, the intrinsic standard deviation in the logarithmic mass bias is 0.014.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：纯引力模拟中的星系团透镜质量偏差，假设固定浓度\(c_{200{c}}=3.5\)。误差棒表示平均偏差\(\pm 1\sigma\)，并根据其\(\Omega_{{m}}\)值进行颜色编码。水平线表示我们基准WMAP7宇宙学中的质量偏差，垂直虚线表示WMAP7宇宙学参数。偏差随着\(\Omega_{{m}}\)和\(\sigma_{8}\)值的增加而增加。在我们探测的宇宙学范围内，对数质量偏差的内在标准差为0.014。

title: Impact of subhalo dynamical friction heating on the formation of the first structures in the universe
summary: We present a model for gas heating, driven by dynamical friction from orbiting subhalos within dark matter halos. Using data from the TNG50 simulation, we derive the subhalo mass function and calculate the dynamical friction heating rate for a wide range of halo masses and redshifts from $z = 15$ to 0. Our results show that, by converting gravitational potential energy into thermal energy, dynamical friction is an important mechanism for galaxy quenching in massive halos at low redshifts, consistent with previous studies. Additionally, we find that in the early universe at $z \sim 15$, heating rates can be comparable to the molecular hydrogen cooling rates in metal-free minihalos. This can suppress gas cooling and fragmentation and does increase the critical molecular fraction for Pop III star formation by up to one order of magnitude, thereby making Pop III star formation more difficult. In combination with the Lyman-Werner background, the dynamical friction heating mechanism favors the formation of direct-collapse black hole (DCBH) seeds in atomic cooling halos, even when the average H$_2$ fraction is $\sim 10^{-5}$ during the minihalo progenitor phase. Dynamical friction heating at a fixed host halo mass can vary by two orders of magnitude due to the scatter in the number of subhalos. To capture dynamical friction heating in simulations, it is necessary to resolve subhalos with a subhalo to host halo mass ratio $ψ\gtrsim 0.05$.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个气体加热模型，该模型由暗物质晕内轨道运动的子晕的动力学摩擦驱动。利用TNG50模拟的数据，我们推导了子晕质量函数，并计算了从红移z=15到0的广泛晕质量和红移范围内的动力学摩擦加热率。我们的结果表明，通过将引力势能转化为热能，动力学摩擦是大质量晕在低红移下星系熄灭的一个重要机制，这与先前的研究一致。此外，我们发现，在早期宇宙z~15时，加热率可以与无金属微晕中的分子氢冷却率相当。这可以抑制气体冷却和碎裂，并将Pop III恒星形成的临界分子分数提高多达一个数量级，从而使Pop III恒星形成更加困难。结合Lyman-Werner背景，动力学摩擦加热机制有利于在原子冷却晕中形成直接坍缩黑洞种子，即使在微晕前身阶段平均H₂分数约为10⁻⁵时也是如此。由于子晕数量的离散性，在固定的主晕质量下，动力学摩擦加热率可以变化两个数量级。为了在模拟中捕捉动力学摩擦加热，需要解析子晕与主晕质量比ψ≳0.05的子晕。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，动力学摩擦加热是星系演化中的重要物理过程，特别是在早期宇宙中能显著影响第一代恒星和黑洞种子的形成。模拟中需要解析子晕与主晕质量比ψ≳0.05的子晕才能准确捕捉该效应。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Subhalo mass function in TNG50-1 at \(z=0\) . We group the host halos in 5 mass bins separated equally in logarithmic scale, covering the minimum to maximum mass, as shown by the different colors. The solid and dashed grey lines are the evolved and unevolved subhalo mass function, respectively, in \al@jiang_statistics_2016, vandenbosch_statistics_2016 ; \al@jiang_statistics_2016, vandenbosch_statistics_2016 . The vertical dashed lines indicate the critical mass ratio where for the left boundary of the host mass range, its subhalo reaches the resolution limit of 50 dark matter particle mass. Using only the resolved results, i.e. the data to the right of the vertical lines, we show the best-fit subhalo mass function in the solid black line. Our best-fit subhalo mass function naturally becomes almost the same as the evolved subhalo mass function in \al@jiang_statistics_2016, vandenbosch_statistics_2016 ; \al@jiang_statistics_2016, vandenbosch_statistics_2016 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：TNG50-1在\(z=0\)处的子晕质量函数。我们将主晕按对数尺度等分为5个质量区间，覆盖从最小到最大质量，如不同颜色所示。灰色实线和虚线分别是\al@jiang_statistics_2016, vandenbosch_statistics_2016 ; \al@jiang_statistics_2016, vandenbosch_statistics_2016中的演化和未演化子晕质量函数。垂直虚线表示临界质量比，在该处，对于主晕质量范围的左边界，其子晕达到50个暗物质粒子质量的分辨率极限。仅使用已解析的结果，即垂直线右侧的数据，我们以黑色实线显示了最佳拟合的子晕质量函数。我们的最佳拟合子晕质量函数自然变得与\al@jiang_statistics_2016, vandenbosch_statistics_2016 ; \al@jiang_statistics_2016, vandenbosch_statistics_2016中的演化子晕质量函数几乎相同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Same as Figure 1 but at \(z=12\) . The slope of the SHMF is shallower compared to \(z=0\) because at larger \(\psi\) , \(dN/d\lg\psi\) is closer to the unevolved SHMF in JvBI .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：与图1相同，但在\(z=12\)处。SHMF的斜率比\(z=0\)处更平缓，因为在较大的\(\psi\)处，\(dN/d\lg\psi\)更接近JvBI中的未演化SHMF。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The evolution of the best-fit \(\alpha\) (red dots) and \(\lg A\) (blue triangles) as a function of redshift. From \(z=15\) to \(z=0\) , the subhalos of higher mass ratios transform from being similar to the unevolved SHMF to being similar to the evolved SHMF, leading to a steeper slope, or a larger \(\alpha\) . In the fitting for SHMF, \(\lg A\) is anti-correlated with \(\alpha\) . At \(z=0\) , our results agree with the evolved SHMF in \al@jiang_statistics_2016, vandenbosch_statistics_2016 ; \al@jiang_statistics_2016, vandenbosch_statistics_2016 , which are indicated by the filled grey circles and triangles. The dashed lines show the fit for the trend of the redshift evolution of the best-fit \(\alpha\) and \(\lg A\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：最佳拟合\(\alpha\)（红点）和\(\lg A\)（蓝三角）随红移的演化。从\(z=15\)到\(z=0\)，较高质量比的子晕从类似于未演化SHMF转变为类似于演化SHMF，导致斜率更陡，即\(\alpha\)更大。在SHMF的拟合中，\(\lg A\)与\(\alpha\)呈反相关。在\(z=0\)处，我们的结果与\al@jiang_statistics_2016, vandenbosch_statistics_2016 ; \al@jiang_statistics_2016, vandenbosch_statistics_2016中的演化SHMF一致，如填充的灰色圆圈和三角形所示。虚线显示了最佳拟合\(\alpha\)和\(\lg A\)红移演化趋势的拟合结果。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Same as Figure 3 but for the evolution of best-fit \(\omega\) and \(\ln\beta\) in SHMF. We use a piecewise function to fit their evolution, which is a constant for \(z>6\) and a linearly increasing line below \(z=6\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：与图3相同，但针对SHMF中最佳拟合\(\omega\)和\(\ln\beta\)的演化。我们使用分段函数来拟合它们的演化，该函数在\(z>6\)时为常数，在\(z=6\)以下为线性递增线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The scatter of the cumulative SHMF at \(z=0\) . Same as Figure 1 , the rainbow colors represent different host halo mass bins, and the black solid line is overall best-fit SHMF. The vertical lines correspond to mass resolution. We show the scatter of the SHMF in the TNG data with the error bars. As a comparison, we use dashed lines to indicate the range of Poisson fluctuations. The scatter becomes super-Poissonian when \(\psi\lesssim 10^{-2}\) , especially for the lowest mass ratios.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：\(z=0\)处累积SHMF的离散性。与图1相同，彩虹色代表不同的主晕质量区间，黑色实线是整体最佳拟合SHMF。垂直线对应质量分辨率。我们用误差棒显示TNG数据中SHMF的离散性。作为比较，我们用虚线表示泊松涨落的范围。当\(\psi\lesssim 10^{-2}\)时，离散性变为超泊松分布，尤其是在最低质量比处。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Same as Figure 6 but at \(z=12\) . The sub-Poissonian feature is more obvious at the higher mass ratio end \(\psi>10^{-1.5}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：与图6相同，但在\(z=12\)处。在较高质量比端\(\psi>10^{-1.5}\)，亚泊松分布特征更为明显。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Conditional probability distribution of \(\log\mathcal{A}\) of the subhalos at \(z=12\) . Left panel: PDF of \(\log\mathcal{A}\) for each given subhalo mass. Right panel: PDF of \(\log\mathcal{A}\) for each given mass ratio. The red dashed lines bracket the 16-84 percentile, and the grey lines show the median \(\log\mathcal{A}\) . The black dotted lines indicate \(\mathcal{A}=1\) , the boundary between linear and nonlinear perturbation. There is a strong correlation between \(\mathcal{A}\) and the mass ratio \(\psi\) between the subhalo and the host halo.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：\(z=12\)处子晕\(\log\mathcal{A}\)的条件概率分布。左图：每个给定子晕质量的\(\log\mathcal{A}\)的概率密度函数。右图：每个给定质量比的\(\log\mathcal{A}\)的概率密度函数。红色虚线标出16-84百分位范围，灰色线显示\(\log\mathcal{A}\)的中位数。黑色点线表示\(\mathcal{A}=1\)，即线性和非线性扰动的边界。\(\mathcal{A}\)与子晕和主晕之间的质量比\(\psi\)存在强相关性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Mach number histogram of subhalos in TNG50-1 at \(z=0\) . The dashed lines show the fit results assuming a Maxwell-Boltzmann distribution. Different colors correspond to host halo mass bins from \(10^{7.5}-10^{14}M_{\odot}/h\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图8：TNG50-1在\(z=0\)处子晕的马赫数直方图。虚线显示了假设麦克斯韦-玻尔兹曼分布时的拟合结果。不同颜色对应从\(10^{7.5}-10^{14}M_{\odot}/h\)的主晕质量区间。
